message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "Notebook\nAE" as NAE
box "CSE & Hosted Resources"
participant "CSE" as CSE
participant "StreetLight-AE-1\nLight-Container-1" as SL1 #Orange
participant "StreetLight-AE-2\nLight-Container-2" as SL2 #Orange
end box

NAE -> CSE : <s>\nopt

group opt
    CSE -> SL1 : RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-1/Light-Container-1
    SL1 --> CSE : Response

    CSE -> SL2 : RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-2/Light-Container-2
    SL2 --> CSE : Response
end

CSE --> NAE : ed)

@enduml
```
